title: Arbix Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: rug pull involving direct vault fund draining and token minting followed by dumping on decentralized exchange

prevention.rule: Block any tx that mints large amounts of tokens and immediately sells them on a DEX

red_flags: large token mint followed by immediate sale on DEX
deletion of website, Twitter, and Telegram accounts
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that mints large amounts of tokens and immediately sells them on a DEX
summary: Arbix Finance, an arbitrage-focused project on Binance Smart Chain, was rug pulled, draining over $10 million in user funds and deleting their website and social media accounts. A guard could have detected this by blocking large token mints followed by immediate sales on a decentralized exchange.
